column2: HDMI, DisplayPort, and Thunderbolt display connections can carry {{c1::audio}} as well as video when the OS output is configured correctly.
column3: The troubleshooting value is checking routing and output selection, not memorizing audio codec details.
column4:
Why

Built-in monitor speakers may not work if the OS sends sound to another output or the display expects a different audio input.
